paths.title: Circuits 101
paths.subtitle: From a passive filter to an op-amp stage.

steps.label: ChuaCircuit
steps.goal: Run it. Watch the chaotic attractor form on the XY plot.

steps.label: CauerLowPass
steps.goal: 5th-order Cauer filter. Compare input to filtered output.

steps.label: Rectifier
steps.goal: Turn AC into pulsed DC. Overlay grid + load voltage.

steps.label: SaturatingInductor
steps.goal: Inductor hits its B-H knee. See current go non-linear.

steps.label: OpAmpDetailed
steps.goal: Amplify a small sine. Tune the feedback ratio, re-run.

steps.label: PID_Controller
steps.goal: Step change in setpoint. Watch P-I-D tame the response.

steps.label: FilterWithRiseTime
steps.goal: Low-pass with a rise-time spec. Time the 10→90% climb.

steps.label: InverseModel
steps.goal: Invert a transfer function live. The classic trick.

steps.label: RealNetwork1
steps.goal: Arithmetic blocks wired into a tiny network.

steps.label: LogicalNetwork1
steps.goal: Boolean gates reacting to pulses. Read the truth table.

paths.title: Moving parts
paths.subtitle: Mechanics from a spring-damper to a 3D pendulum.

steps.label: Rotational.First
steps.goal: Torque through inertia + spring-damper. The hello world.

steps.label: ElasticBearing
steps.goal: Shaft flex under load. Watch the phase lag develop.

steps.label: CoupledClutches
steps.goal: Clutches engage in sequence. Follow torque hand-off.

steps.label: Translational.Damper
steps.goal: Mass-spring-damper in 1D. Change c, see the overshoot shift.

steps.label: DoublePendulum
steps.goal: Chaotic 3D two-link pendulum. Tweak initial angle.
